runs.text:
He suggested addressing him as ‘Usurper and Enemy of the Human Race.’”

Dolgorúkov laughed merrily.

“No more than that?” said Bolkónski.

“All the same, Bilíbin found a suitable title for the
superscription. He said: ‘To the Usurper and Enemy of the Human
Race.’”

“That’s all,” said Prince Andrew carelessly.

“It was not necessary to send a reply.”

“I don’t think it will be necessary. That’s just what I think.”

“And you are right,” said Bolkónski.

And the young man, who had been on the point of getting into an
argument, became particularly anxious to support the opinion he had
just expressed.

While the two were talking, Borís several times regretted his
readiness to interrupt, but still he had several times glanced at
Dolgorúkov, and when the latter went out he nodded to him

He suggested addressing him as ‘Usurper and Enemy of the Human Race.’”

Dolgorúkov laughed merrily.

“No more than that?” said Bolkónski.

“All the same, Bilíbin found a serious title for the address. And he
is a witty and clever fellow.”

“What was it?”

“‘To the Head of the French Government... Au chef du gouvernement
français,’” said Dolgorúkov, with grave satisfaction. “Good, wasn’t
it?”

“Yes, but very bad for him,” said Bolkónski.

“Oh, very bad! A brother gets a thrashing and holds his tongue, but
an overlord may be attacked and he can’t cry out.”

“Oh, why that?” asked Dolgorúkov. “You’d have cried out, and
very likely would have said: ‘I may be beaten, but it’s on
horseback and in full uniform,
